text.p: I wish to write and complain ing about the poor State of roads in my town and also to discusse the consequences behind the problem.

I want to highlight the State of road in my town, most especially the Streets which are 1 word not well constructed. Since the road or the Streets in the town are not well co-nstructed, its made the motorist and motorcycle, bicycle difficult to move inside the town, due to poor State of road.

Since there is not well constructed road, which means the gutter are not also well constructed, which lea-d to erossion. erossion which is the wash 1 word away of the sub-soil or top-soil. The consequences behind this is that it will d ( erossion) destroye houses, since there is not water way (gutter) to control ero-ssion.
Mr. Chairman I want to let you know that due to the poor State of road in my town it lead people to migrate from the town to another, due to the poor State of beign.

The consequences behind it is that the population of the town, not only the town even the local government will be reduce and 1 character if the population is reduce there will be less revenue sources of revenue which will lead the local government to be poor in terms of finance and other things.

However, the less population of the local government because of the migration that have take place in the area, its affect the council in term of government revenue allocation to the local gover-nment which serve as consequences.
Sir, if the State of beign is not favourable to the people living in the area, it will lead to Stav Starvation
and you know Stat that Starvation can couse alot of problems to a human, such as death, people can die because of Starvation.
Mr. Chairman, I want to appeal to you that there should be solution to this problem, about the poor State of road in my town.

There should be contruction of good Streets and roads in the town and also good construction of gutter for water way in order to control erossion to prevent the demolition of houses, for people not to migrate from the town to another, So as to increase the population of the local government , hence othe all other things will be equal, such as revenue earning, government revenue allocation e.t.c
